step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the transcript: 1. Avnet IoT Connect separates control plane and data plane. 2. Control plane: Admin (UserConsumerWebMobile) uses AWS Organizations and CloudFormation to provision dedicated data plane environments for new OEMs. RDS stores admin configuration details, and API Gateway exposes metrics. 3. Data plane: IoT devices (UserConsumerMobile) connect to IoT Core. 4. IoT rules/actions route messages to Amazon Kinesis and AWS Lambda. 5. Kinesis writes raw data to S3 (cold storage) and DynamoDB (NoSQL generic storage). 6. Lambdas run business applications and notifications. 7. For AI/ML inferences, the application uses SageMaker integrated with Amazon Bedrock, and supplier tech embeds the results back to the devices.

graph.name: Avnet: IoT Connect Platform for OEM Device Ingestion and AI Inferences
graph.notes: Avnet's IoT Connect platform helps OEMs onboard devices and connect them to the cloud at scale. It separates the control plane (utilizing AWS Organizations, RDS, and API Gateway for customer provisioning) from the data plane. The data plane ingests telemetry via IoT Core, streaming to S3 and DynamoDB via Kinesis, and triggering Lambdas for business workflows. SageMaker and Bedrock run cloud-based ML model inferences and send predictions back to the devices.

nodes.name: IoT Connect Admin
nodes.notes: Admin users who monitor data planes and onboard new OEM organizations.

nodes.name: AWS Organizations
nodes.notes: Automates account generation and isolation for new OEM clients.

nodes.name: AWS CloudFormation
nodes.notes: Spins up dedicated data plane infrastructure for new accounts.

nodes.name: Admin database (SQL Server)
nodes.notes: Stores metadata about client accounts and deployed data planes.

nodes.name: API Gateway
nodes.notes: Exposes API metrics and data plane monitoring details to administrators.

nodes.name: IoT Devices
nodes.notes: OEM client devices deployed on the field.

nodes.name: AWS IoT Core
nodes.notes: Ingests telemetry data from field devices and executes routing rules.

nodes.name: Amazon Kinesis
nodes.notes: Ingests telemetry streams from IoT Core actions.

nodes.name: Cold Storage S3
nodes.notes: Stores historical telemetry data for long-term archiving.

nodes.name: Device Data DynamoDB
nodes.notes: Generic NoSQL database used to store flexible data points for varied devices.

nodes.name: Rule Processing Lambdas
nodes.notes: 12 distinct Lambda functions that trigger custom business alerts and push data to apps.

nodes.name: Amazon SageMaker
nodes.notes: Hosts and executes machine learning models in the cloud.

nodes.name: Amazon Bedrock
nodes.notes: Integrates public models for advanced AI capabilities and inferences.

edges.notes: Admin updates credentials and configuration table.
Archives telemetry data in cold storage.
Sends model predictions back to field devices.
